name: 运动学(微积分)
subject: physics
domain_name: 力学-运动学与动力学 Mechanics: Kinematics/Dynamics
curriculum_points:
1.2.C.1.i
Instantaneous velocity is the rate of change of the object’s position, which is equal to the derivative of position with respect to time.

1.2.C.1.ii
Instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velocity, which is equal to the derivative of velocity with respect to time.
Relevant equations:

 dv
a=
dt
dv

x dt

1.2.C.2
Time-dependent functions and instantaneous values of position, velocity, and acceleration can be determined using differentiation and integration.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「运动学(微积分)」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.C.1.i
Instantaneous velocity is the rate of change of the object’s position, which is equal to the derivative of pos…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.2.C.1.ii
Instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velo… 对理解「运动学(微积分)」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
